findings.title: requireTelegramForPrompts 500 javobida xom err.message qaytaradi (info leak)
findings.description: catch blokida `res.status(500).json({ message: err.message })` — ichki xato matni (Mongoose/Telegram API tafsilotlari) clientga ochiq qaytadi. Loyiha errorMiddleware standartiga (prod'da generic 500, stack hech qachon response'da emas) zid. subscriptionCheck.js da xato to'g'ri console.error bilan ushlangan va generic matn qaytadi; bu fayl esa raw message uzatadi.
findings.fix: err.message o'rniga generic matn: `console.error('prompt-sub-check', err); return res.status(500).json({ success:false, message:'Server xatosi' });`

findings.title: requireTelegramForPromptsRead — user null bo'lsa null-deref / 500 (auth-dan keyin o'chirilgan hisob)
findings.description: `const user = await User.findById(req.user._id).select('socialSubscriptions role')` — agar foydalanuvchi authenticate'dan keyin (race) o'chirilgan/yo'q bo'lsa user=null, keyin `performSubscriptionCheck(user)` ichida `user.socialSubscriptions.instagram` o'qishda TypeError → catch → 500 (+ SEC-001 bilan birga raw message leak). Authorization teshigi emas, lekin null guard yo'q.
findings.fix: findById'dan keyin: `if (!user) return res.status(401).json({ success:false, code:'AUTH_REQUIRED', message:'Tizimga kiring.' });`

findings.title: Telegram subscription gate API xatoda DB qiymatiga fail-open fallback qiladi
findings.description: Telegram getChatMember API xato bersa (`result.checked === false`) oxirgi DB qiymati (`telegram.subscribed`) ishlatiladi. UX-himoya sifatida tushunarli (nohaq bloklamaslik), lekin foydalanuvchi kanaldan chiqib API'ni vaqtincha buzsa eski 'subscribed=true' bilan biznes-kritik gate'dan o'tishi mumkin; 5 daqiqalik cache buni kuchaytiradi. Fail-open xulq.
findings.fix: Eski true qiymatga ishonish oynasini cheklang (masalan verifiedAt 24-48 soatdan eski bo'lsa fallback'da true bermaslik) yoki fail-open oynasini qisqartiring. Biznes qaror talab qiladi.

findings.title: Public email verify — alohida tor rate-limit yo'q (faqat umumiy otpLimiter + per-account cap)
findings.description: verifyEmailPublic 6-xonali kodni per-account 5 urinish bilan cheklaydi (yaxshi) va route'da otpLimiter bor. Lekin attempt-cap faqat hisob darajasida; otpLimiter IP/window. Authenticated verify-email uchun alohida verifyEmailLimiter bor, public uchun yo'q. Tarqatilgan IP + ko'p hisob ssenariysida 6-xonali fazoga statistik brute oynasi qoladi. Mavjud himoya yetarli, ammo kuchaytirish mumkin.
findings.fix: verify-email-public uchun alohida tor limiter qo'shing yoki kodni 8-xonali qiling. Ixtiyoriy hardening.

summary: Auth/JWT/CSRF/CORS/cookie qatlami juda mustahkam: JWT secret prod fail-fast + algorithm pinned HS256 + unique secrets, refresh rotation/reuse detection + absolute cap, hamma joyda timing-safe taqqoslash, enumeration-safe login/forgot/verify, httpOnly+Secure+SameSite cookie, CSRF double-submit HMAC, mongoSanitize(body,params), CORS callback(null,false), TMA initData HMAC to'g'ri (Telegram spec). Hardcoded secret yo'q (DUMMY_HASH ataylab). Topilgan muammolar mayda: requireTelegramForPrompts 500'da raw err.message qaytaradi va null-user guard yo'q; qolgan ikkitasi subscription fail-open va public verify rate-limit hardening takliflari.
